title: Bipolar & Lithium Mastery
content: • Dx: Manic Episode: Sleeping little (>1wk), pressured speech, risky behavior. • Risk: Lithium Toxicity: Precipitated by NSAIDs (Advil). Use Aspirin instead. • Tx: Dialysis if Level >4.

title: Personality Clusters Mnemonics
content:
• Cluster A (Weird): Paranoid, Schizoid, Schizotypal.
• Cluster B (Wild): Antisocial, Borderline, Histrionic, Narcissistic.
• Cluster C (Worried): Avoidant, OCPD, Dependent.

title: APGAR & Neonatal Injuries
content: • Dx: APGAR: 1 min (labor tolerance), 5 min (resuscitation). Does NOT predict neuro outcome. • Dx: Erb-Duchenne (C5-C6): Medially rotated arm (Waiters tip). • Tx: Clavicular Fracture: No tx needed; callus in 1wk.

title: Consent & Capacity in Canada
content: • Risk: Adult Refusal: Do not override a capable adult even if treatment is life-saving (e.g. Jehovah’s Witness). • Rule: Mature Minor: Consent is capacity-based, not age-based. • Risk: Child Abuse: Report immediately on suspicion.
